scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix backend --no-audit --no-fund && npm run install:chromium && npm ci --prefix frontend --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && node scripts/copy-frontend.js
scripts.render-build: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.install:chromium: cd backend && PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=0 npx playwright install chromium
